Appearances: Daniel Conrad and Robin Rudderow for and with Olga Gishizky. Avid Alavi for Elizabeth Adler (Successor Trustee). Douglas Voorsanger for Mikhail Gishizky.

The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement and Termination of Trust (subject to review of the order). Mr. Voorsanger will have until tomorrow to object to the order. The other four petitions were taken off calendar. Status for filing of final account in the Olga Gishizky Irrevocable Trust (PTR-09-292421) is set for April 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PTR-10-293301 The Gishizky Family Trust.

Appearances: Robin Rudderow for and with Olga Gishizky. Matthew Quint for Mikhail Gishizky.

Counsel stated that they had two sessions with the Mediator and two private sessions, that they have not come to a settlement yet, that they needed to respond to discovery and file additional pleadings, and reqeusted a four month continuance. Ms. Gishizky expressed her concerns. The matters were continued to May 10, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To 1) Reimburse Beneficiary For Fees Paid To Her Attorneys And 2) Pay Unpaid Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Doug Voorsanger for Mikhail Gishizky (Objector).

The Court stated that the fees appeared to be in order and noted that the other petitions were previously continued to December 8, 2010. Mr. Voorsanger stated that they hadn't asserted any objections to the fees. The Court then granted the petition (order signed).

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

Objections To Fiduciary'S Account, Petn. To Surcharge Fiduciary And Other Remedies For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Continued To Dec-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PTR-10-293301 (The Gishizky Family 2000 Revocable Trust).

Appearances: Doug Voorsanger for Mikhail Gishizky. Robin Rudderow for Olga Gishizky.

Ms. Rudderow stated that the parties were in the middle of mediation and that they would need time to complete the mediation. The Court continued both matters to December 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: none present.

Petition To 1) Reimburse Beneficiary For Fees Paid To Her Attorneys And 2) Pay Unpaid Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Sep-08-2010 Continued To Oct-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Elizabeth Adler (Current Successor Trustee). Robin Rudderow for and with Olga Gishizky. Matthew Quint for Mikhail Gishizky.

Ms. Rudderow will file a supplemental declaration with regard to Mr. Mastromonoco's paralegal qualifications. Mr. Quint and Ms. Rudderow presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Mr. Conrad's fees. Ms. Alavi expressed concern about direct distribution to Ms. Gishizky disqualifying her from Social Security benefits and requested a letter from Social Security with regard to what Ms. Gishizky's benefits are. Ms. Rudderow stated that they were willing to have Ms. Alavi rely on Ms. Gishizky's declaration with regard to her benefits, that the focus should be on whether the services benefitted Ms. Gishizky and that Mr. Gishizky's objections should be secondary as he is a remainder Beneficiary. The matter was continued to October 12, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Off Calendar

Objections To Fiduciary'S Account, Petn. To Surcharge Fiduciary And Other Remedies For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Oct-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 293301 The Gishizky Family 2000 Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Robin Rudderow and Elizabeth Hanowsky for and with Olga Gishizky. Douglas Voorsanger for and with Mikhail Gishizky.

Mr. Voorsanger stated that there was a $40,000.00 reserve remaining in the family trust, that there was a civil matter case number CGC-10-498919 filed with similar issues which appear to be overlapping with the probate pleadings and that he does not have the files from previous Counsel. Ms. Rudderow stated that they had no accounting with regard to the family trust, that they had no definitive list of the Parent's assets, no list of income and expenses, no list of allocations and that the Mother's estate had been closed in 2007. Counsel agreed to discuss the issues and participate in mediation. The matter was continued to October 5, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
